title: crepis × hybrida
intro: Crepis × hybrida, also known as the hybrid hawk's beard or yellow hawk's beard, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Consuming Crepis × hybrida is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. The herbal preparations of Crepis × hybrida typically involve infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's roots in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
